title: First (Heuristic) Proof of the Global Gauss-Bonnet Theorem

visual_sequence.observation: A loop deforms while its tangent degree remains stable.
The tangent or normal map winds around S1.
Positive and negative curvature intervals preserve total degree.
The invariant changes only through forbidden singular events.
